description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, streamlined design. The headband and outer ear cups are finished in a light blue color, while the ear pads and inner cup surfaces are black, likely made of synthetic leather or foam for comfort. The headband is broad and slightly cushioned, providing support for extended wear. The ear cups are circular and appear to be adjustable to fit different head sizes. The headphones have a minimalistic look, with no visible wires, suggesting they may be wireless. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcements inside the headband and ear cup hinges.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with a light blue headband and black cushioned ear pads. The design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups and the full arch of the headband, highlighting the black ear pads and blue exterior.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the headband and the circular shape of the ear cup, with the blue color dominating.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the headphones' symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and the headband's curvature.
